mapper.sql: user_id, email, display_name, status, email_verified_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
u.user_id, u.email, u.display_name, u.status, u.email_verified_at, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at
mapper.select: select from users where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
select from users where email = #{email} and deleted_at is null
insert into users (email, display_name, email_verified_at) values (#{email}, #{displayName}, now()) returning
mapper.insert: insert into user_credentials (user_id, password_hash, password_changed_at) values (#{userId}, #{passwordHash}, now())
mapper.select: select uc.password_hash from user_credentials uc join users u on u.user_id = uc.user_id where uc.user_id = #{userId} and u.deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into user_roles (user_id, role_id) select #{userId}, role_id from roles where role_code = 'USER' and is_active = true on conflict do nothing
mapper.select: select 'ROLE_' || r.role_code from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.is_active = true and r.is_active = true and (ur.expires_at is null or ur.expires_at > now()) union select p.permission_code from user_roles ur join roles r on r.role_id = ur.role_id join role_permissions rp on rp.role_id = r.role_id join permissions p on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.is_active = true and r.is_active = true and p.is_active = true and (ur.expires_at is null or ur.expires_at > now())
mapper.update: update users set last_login_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null

insert into user_credentials (user_id, password_hash, password_changed_at) select #{userId}, #{passwordHash}, now() where exists ( select 1 from users where users.user_id = #{userId} and users.deleted_at is null ) on conflict (user_id) do update set password_hash = excluded.password_hash, password_changed_at = excluded.password_changed_at
mapper.select: select from oauth_accounts oa join users u on u.user_id = oa.user_id where oa.provider = #{provider} and oa.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId} and oa.deleted_at is null and u.deleted_at is null
mapper.insert: insert into oauth_accounts (user_id, provider, provider_user_id, email, email_verified) values (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{emailVerified}) on conflict do nothing
mapper.update: update users set status = 'WITHDRAWN', deleted_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
update oauth_accounts set deleted_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and deleted_at is null
